vocabulary.example: 在任何社会中，法律的知识是每个公民必须了解的。
vocabulary.translation: In any society, legal knowledge is something every citizen must understand.

vocabulary.example: 无论遇到什么困难，每个人都有社会责任去帮助他人。
vocabulary.translation: No matter what difficulties one faces, everyone has a social responsibility to help others.

vocabulary.example: 任何社会都需要法律知识来维护秩序。
vocabulary.translation: Any society needs legal knowledge to maintain order.

vocabulary.example: 由优秀的教师负责教育，学生才能获得丰富的知识。
vocabulary.translation: It is because excellent teachers take responsibility for education that students can gain rich knowledge.

vocabulary.example: 科学和艺术都是社会发展的重要组成部分。
vocabulary.translation: Both science and art are important components of social development.

vocabulary.example: 任何人都有学习知识的权利。
vocabulary.translation: Anyone has the right to acquire knowledge.

vocabulary.example: 语言是文化传承的工具，任何语言都值得重视和保护。
vocabulary.translation: Language is a tool for cultural heritage; any language is worthy of valuing and protecting.

vocabulary.example: 由各领域的专家共同发展科学和艺术，才能让社会进步。
vocabulary.translation: It is by having experts from all fields jointly developing science and art that society can progress.

vocabulary.example: 国际交流促进了不同民族之间的相互了解和发展。
vocabulary.translation: International exchange promotes mutual understanding and development between different ethnic groups.

vocabulary.example: 国际交流由各国代表来共同进行。
vocabulary.translation: International exchanges are conducted jointly by representatives of various countries.

vocabulary.example: 教育的发展由社会和政府共同负责。
vocabulary.translation: Educational development is the shared responsibility of society and the government.

vocabulary.english: To attach importance to; to value
vocabulary.example: 无论你走到哪里，都要记得重视自己的社会责任。
vocabulary.translation: No matter where you go, always remember to value your social responsibilities.

vocabulary.pinyin: chéng dān shè huì zé rèn

key_sentences.chinese: 无论遇到什么困难，每个人都有社会责任去帮助他人。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wú lùn yù dào shén me kùn nán, měi ge rén dōu yǒu shè huì zé rèn qù bāng zhù tā rén.
key_sentences.english: No matter what difficulties one faces, everyone has a social responsibility to help others.

key_sentences.chinese: 由优秀的教师负责教育，学生才能获得丰富的知识。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yóu yōu xiù de jiào shī fù zé jiào yù, xué shēng cái néng huò dé fēng fù de zhī shi.
key_sentences.english: It is because excellent teachers take responsibility for education that students can gain rich knowledge.

key_sentences.chinese: 在任何社会中，法律知识是每个公民必须了解的。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zài rèn hé shè huì zhōng, fǎ lǜ zhī shi shì měi ge gōng mín bì xū liǎo jiě de.
key_sentences.english: In any society, legal knowledge is something every citizen must understand.

key_sentences.chinese: 国际交流促进了不同民族之间的相互了解和发展。
key_sentences.pinyin: Guó jì jiāo liú cù jìn le bù tóng mín zú zhī jiān de xiāng hù liǎo jiě hé fā zhǎn.
key_sentences.english: International exchange promotes mutual understanding and development between different ethnic groups.

key_sentences.chinese: 科学和艺术都是社会发展的重要组成部分。
key_sentences.pinyin: Kē xué hé yì shù dōu shì shè huì fā zhǎn de zhòng yào zǔ chéng bù fèn.
key_sentences.english: Both science and art are important components of social development.

key_sentences.chinese: 语言是文化传承的工具，任何语言都值得重视和保护。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yǔ yán shì wén huà chuán chéng de gōng jù, rèn hé yǔ yán dōu zhí de zhòng shì hé bǎo hù.
key_sentences.english: Language is a tool for cultural heritage; any language is worthy of valuing and protecting.

key_sentences.chinese: 教育帮助人们传播知识，也增强了他们的社会责任感。
key_sentences.pinyin: Jiào yù bāng zhù rén men chuán bō zhī shi, yě zēng qiáng le tā men de shè huì zé rèn gǎn.
key_sentences.english: Education helps people spread knowledge and also strengthens their sense of social responsibility.

key_sentences.chinese: 每个公民都应该尊重法律，承担自己的社会责任。
key_sentences.pinyin: Měi gè gōng mín dōu yīng gāi zūn zhòng fǎ lǜ, chéng dān zì jǐ de shè huì zé rèn.
key_sentences.english: Every citizen should respect the law and take on their own social responsibility.

key_sentences.chinese: 科学和艺术都是传播知识的重要方式。
key_sentences.pinyin: Kē xué hé yì shù dōu shì chuán bō zhī shi de zhòng yào fāng shì.
key_sentences.english: Science and art are both important ways to spread knowledge.

grammar_points.title: 无论...都... — No matter what / Regardless
grammar_points.explanation: 无论...都... means 'no matter what/how/who/where/when...still'. It is more formal than 不管...都..., but both share the same structure. 无论 introduces the variable condition (often using question words: 什么、怎么、谁、哪里、多么); 都 introduces the unchanging result. Structure: 无论 + [Variable Condition], Subject + 都 + [Unchanged Result]. Example: 无论遇到什么困难，他都不放弃。(No matter what difficulties he faces, he never gives up.)

examples.chinese: 无论在哪个社会，法律知识都很重要。
examples.pinyin: Wú lùn zài nǎ ge shè huì, fǎ lǜ zhī shi dōu hěn zhòng yào.
examples.english: No matter what society you are in, legal knowledge is important.

examples.chinese: 无论语言不同，艺术都能让人们相互理解。
examples.pinyin: Wú lùn yǔ yán bù tóng, yì shù dōu néng ràng rén men xiāng hù lǐ jiě.
examples.english: No matter what language is spoken, art can enable mutual understanding between people.

exercises.question: _____ 遇到什么困难，社会责任都是不能逃避的。
无论国际交流多么频繁，民族文化 _____ 应该被保护。
Choose the correct sentence with 无论...都...
exercises.correct: 无论什么语言，都有其独特的艺术价值。
options: 无论什么语言，都有其独特的艺术价值。
什么语言无论，都有其独特的艺术价值。
无论都什么语言，有其独特的艺术价值。
无论什么语言有，其独特的艺术价值都。
option_pinyin: Wú lùn shén me yǔ yán, dōu yǒu qí dú tè de yì shù jià zhí.
Shén me yǔ yán wú lùn, dōu yǒu qí dú tè de yì shù jià zhí.
Wú lùn dōu shén me yǔ yán, yǒu qí dú tè de yì shù jià zhí.
Wú lùn shén me yǔ yán yǒu, qí dú tè de yì shù jià zhí dōu.

exercises.question: What is the difference between 无论 and 不管?
exercises.correct: 无论 is more formal; 不管 is more colloquial
options: 无论 is more formal; 不管 is more colloquial
They are completely different in meaning
无论 can only be used in writing

exercises.question: _____ 教育发展得多快，学生都要重视知识。

grammar_points.title: 由 — From / By (indicating agent or origin)
grammar_points.explanation: 由 (yóu) is a preposition with multiple uses. As a formal agent marker: 由 + Agent + Verb (indicating who performs the action). Example: 这件事由他负责。(This matter is to be handled by him.) As a source/origin marker: 由...到... (from...to...) or 由于 (due to, covered in Lesson 10). In passive-like constructions, 由 indicates who is responsible for or who carries out an action, similar to 让 but more formal. Structure: 由 + Person/Group + Verb.

examples.chinese: 教育的发展由社会和政府共同负责。
examples.pinyin: Jiào yù de fā zhǎn yóu shè huì hé zhèng fǔ gòng tóng fù zé.
examples.english: Educational development is the shared responsibility of society and the government.

examples.chinese: 国际交流由各国代表来共同进行。
examples.pinyin: Guó jì jiāo liú yóu gè guó dài biǎo lái gòng tóng jìn xíng.
examples.english: International exchanges are conducted jointly by representatives of various countries.

exercises.question: 这个法律知识课程 _____ 专家教授来讲解。
Choose the correct sentence with 由 as an agent marker.
exercises.correct: 这次国际交流由两国大使负责。
options: 这次国际交流由两国大使负责。
这次国际交流两国大使由负责。
由这次国际交流两国大使负责。
这次国际交流负责由两国大使。
option_pinyin: Zhè cì guó jì jiāo liú yóu liǎng guó dà shǐ fù zé.
Zhè cì guó jì jiāo liú liǎng guó dà shǐ yóu fù zé.
Yóu zhè cì guó jì jiāo liú liǎng guó dà shǐ fù zé.
Zhè cì guó jì jiāo liú fù zé yóu liǎng guó dà shǐ.

exercises.question: 民族艺术的传承 _____ 年轻一代来负责。
由 as an agent marker answers which question?
这个科学项目 _____ 研究团队来完成。

grammar_points.title: 任何 — Any / Whichever
grammar_points.explanation: 任何 (rèn hé) is a determiner meaning 'any', 'whatever', or 'whichever'. It emphasizes that there are no exceptions — it applies to everything or everyone in the category. Structure: 任何 + Noun (+ 都/也). It is often combined with 都 or 也 for emphasis. Example: 任何人都可以学中文。(Anyone can study Chinese.) Note: 任何 cannot stand alone as a pronoun — it must be followed by a noun.

examples.chinese: 任何社会都需要法律知识来维护秩序。
examples.pinyin: Rèn hé shè huì dōu xū yào fǎ lǜ zhī shi lái wéi hù zhì xù.
examples.english: Any society needs legal knowledge to maintain order.

examples.chinese: 在国际交流中，任何语言都值得尊重。
examples.pinyin: Zài guó jì jiāo liú zhōng, rèn hé yǔ yán dōu zhí de zūn zhòng.
examples.english: In international exchange, any language deserves respect.

exercises.question: _____ 民族都有自己独特的艺术文化。
Choose the correct use of 任何.
exercises.correct: 任何人都有学习知识的权利。
options: 任何人都有学习知识的权利。
都任何人有学习知识的权利。
任何都人有学习知识的权利。
有学习知识的权利任何人都。
option_pinyin: Rèn hé rén dōu yǒu xué xí zhī shi de quán lì.
Dōu rèn hé rén yǒu xué xí zhī shi de quán lì.
Rèn hé dōu rén yǒu xué xí zhī shi de quán lì.
Yǒu xué xí zhī shi de quán lì rèn hé rén dōu.

exercises.question: _____ 科学发现都对社会发展有贡献。
任何 must be followed by:
教育是 _____ 人都应该重视的事情。

culture_notes.title: Chinese Social Values — Collectivism & Filial Piety
culture_notes.content: Chinese culture is often described as collectivist (集体主义, jítǐ zhǔyì) — placing group harmony, family, and community above individual desires. This contrasts with the more individualistic values common in Western cultures. Key social values include: 孝顺 (xiàoshùn — filial piety: respecting and caring for one's parents and elders), 和谐 (héxié — social harmony: avoiding conflict to maintain group unity), and 面子 (miànzi — face: maintaining social prestige). In practical terms, Chinese people often prioritize family needs over personal ambition, and public disagreements are generally avoided. The concept of 责任 (zérèn — responsibility) is central: individuals are expected to fulfill duties to their family, work unit, and society. These values are reinforced through education and remain influential even as China modernizes rapidly.

idioms.pinyin: lǎo wú lǎo yǐ jí rén zhī lǎo
idioms.english: Respect your own elders and extend that respect to others' elders (Mencius)

quiz.question: What does 重视 mean?
quiz.correct: To attach importance to; to value
options: To attach importance to; to value

quiz.question: Fill in: _____ 遇到什么困难，都要承担社会责任。
Fill in: 这个项目 _____ 科学团队来负责。
Choose the correct use of 任何.
quiz.correct: 任何人都应该遵守法律。
options: 任何人都应该遵守法律。
都任何人应该遵守法律。
任何都应该人遵守法律。
应该遵守任何法律人都。

quiz.question: What does the phrase 社会责任 mean?
What does 孝顺 mean in Chinese culture?
quiz.correct: Filial piety — respecting and caring for parents and elders
options: Filial piety — respecting and caring for parents and elders

quiz.question: What does the phrase 国际交流 mean?
任何 must always be followed by:
What does '承担社会责任' mean?
Fill in: 每个公民都应该 _____ 法律，承担自己的社会责任。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 同学们，无论你们将来从事什么职业，都要重视社会责任。
lines.pinyin: Tóng xué men, wú lùn nǐ men jiāng lái cóng shì shén me zhí yè, dōu yào zhòng shì shè huì zé rèn.
lines.english: Students, no matter what career you pursue in the future, you must all value social responsibility.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 老师，对学生来说，社会责任是什么？
lines.pinyin: Lǎo shī, duì xué shēng lái shuō, shè huì zé rèn shì shén me?
lines.english: Teacher, for students, what is social responsibility?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 任何人都有责任学习法律知识，重视教育，并且为社会发展做出贡献。
lines.pinyin: Rèn hé rén dōu yǒu zé rèn xué xí fǎ lǜ zhī shi, zhòng shì jiào yù, bìng qiě wèi shè huì fā zhǎn zuò chū gòng xiàn.
lines.english: Anyone has the responsibility to learn legal knowledge, value education, and contribute to social development.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那科学和艺术也算社会责任吗？
lines.pinyin: Nà kē xué hé yì shù yě suàn shè huì zé rèn ma?
lines.english: Then do science and art also count as social responsibilities?

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 当然！由各领域的专家共同发展科学和艺术，才能让社会进步。
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán! Yóu gè lǐng yù de zhuān jiā gòng tóng fā zhǎn kē xué hé yì shù, cái néng ràng shè huì jìn bù.
lines.english: Of course! It is by having experts from all fields jointly developing science and art that society can progress.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我们也要重视国际交流，让不同民族的语言和文化互相了解。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ men yě yào zhòng shì guó jì jiāo liú, ràng bù tóng mín zú de yǔ yán hé wén huà hù xiāng liǎo jiě.
lines.english: We also want to value international exchange, allowing different ethnic groups' languages and cultures to understand each other.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 很好！无论你走到哪里，都要记得自己的社会责任。
lines.pinyin: Hěn hǎo! Wú lùn nǐ zǒu dào nǎ lǐ, dōu yào jì de zì jǐ de shè huì zé rèn.
lines.english: Very good! No matter where you go, always remember your social responsibilities.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 杨绛，我发现中国人非常重视家庭，这是为什么？
lines.pinyin: Yáng Jiàng, wǒ fā xiàn zhōng guó rén fēi cháng zhòng shì jiā tíng, zhè shì wèi shén me?
lines.english: Yang Jiang, I notice that Chinese people value family very much. Why is that?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 这是中国的传统社会价值观，孝顺和家庭责任非常重要。
lines.pinyin: Zhè shì zhōng guó de chuán tǒng shè huì jià zhí guān, xiào shùn hé jiā tíng zé rèn fēi cháng zhòng yào.
lines.english: This is China's traditional social values — filial piety and family responsibility are very important.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 无论多忙，都要照顾父母吗？
lines.pinyin: Wú lùn duō máng, dōu yào zhào gù fù mǔ ma?
lines.english: No matter how busy, one should still care for one's parents?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对。这是任何中国人都认为重要的责任。这是由文化传统决定的。
lines.pinyin: Duì. Zhè shì rèn hé zhōng guó rén dōu rèn wéi zhòng yào de zé rèn. Zhè shì yóu wén huà chuán tǒng jué dìng de.
lines.english: Yes. This is a responsibility that any Chinese person considers important. It is determined by cultural tradition.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我明白了，这和我们国家比较个人主义的文化很不同。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ míng bái le, zhè hé wǒ men guó jiā bǐ jiào gè rén zhǔ yì de wén huà hěn bù tóng.
lines.english: I understand now. This is very different from the more individualistic culture of my country.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 对，但无论是集体主义还是个人主义，社会责任都很重要。
lines.pinyin: Duì, dàn wú lùn shì jí tǐ zhǔ yì hái shì gè rén zhǔ yì, shè huì zé rèn dōu hěn zhòng yào.
lines.english: Right, but whether it's collectivism or individualism, social responsibility is important in any case.
